title: 2026 is already on track to be Immutable's biggest year yet
message_html: 2026 is already on track to be Immutable's biggest year yet ...
snippet: Robbie Ferguson | Immutable (@0xferg): 2026 is already on track to be @Immutable's biggest year yet: - Ubisoft (200m+ users) launched their first web3 game on Immutable Play - increased our market share to 700+ games, with $2B in total funding - multiple new AI products in the works
